race.description: Bruiser Young Memorial Light Harness Tas Cup Pace
race.comment: IMPERIAL LAZ NZ (8) continued a string of wins and placings last time when he galloped out but recovered for a 1.7m second. Will need to get the standing start right but won the last time he raced here two back. Can go close. ROCKS ROY (4) has the hoof on the till after back-to-back placings here. Was also in a standing start race last time and missed by just a head. Proven at this longer distance and could break through. GOODTIME OSCAR (5) galloped out last time but had strong standing start form prior, winning four of the previous five outings. Worth another chance. MIGHTY JOLT (7) has joined Michael Laugher since a last-start second at Albion Park. Could measure up.
